title: Insertion Mode
text: Insertion Mode Determines whether a value that the user enters is inserted into the list of predefined items, and if so, whether it must be unique. One of None (default), Unique , Always . Value Description None (Default) No entries are added to the list. Unique The input should only be added if the entry is unique (ignoring case). Always The entry should be added regardless of whether or not it is unique. This setting is useful when using a combo box as a history list. This property cannot be set in ProcScript. Applies to ucombobox (Combo Box) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
